axenic_LD.name: NATL2A cluster axenic_LD (axenic L:D periodic)
axenic_LD.functional_description: Genes in this cluster exhibit 24-h periodicity only in axenic cultures under the diel light:dark cycle. This cluster includes genes involved in photosystem components and light-harvesting complexes that show oscillations tied to the light cycle in axenic conditions.
axenic_LD.temporal_pattern: Genes show 24-h periodicity exclusively in axenic L:D conditions and lose periodicity in coculture and extended darkness conditions.
axenic_LD.confidence_notes: High confidence based on transcriptome periodicity analysis and enrichment tests.

supporting_quotes.quote: The largest group of Prochlorococcus transcripts (42% of all protein-encoding genes) showed 24-h periodicity in both axenic and cocultures under diel L:D conditions but did not continue to oscillate under extended darkness.

axenic_LD+axenic_darkness+coculture_dark.name: NATL2A cluster axenic_LD+axenic_darkness+coculture_darkness (periodic in axenic L:D and darkness)
axenic_LD+axenic_darkness+coculture_dark.assessment_notes: No specific discussion or data for this cluster in the paper.

axenic_LD+coculture_LD.name: NATL2A cluster axenic_LD+coculture_LD (periodic in both L:D conditions)
axenic_LD+coculture_LD.functional_description: This cluster contains the largest number of genes showing 24-h periodicity in both axenic and cocultured Prochlorococcus under diel L:D conditions. Genes include those involved in core metabolic pathways such as Calvin cycle, glycolysis, fatty acid biosynthesis, glycogen metabolism, and photosynthesis.
axenic_LD+coculture_LD.temporal_pattern: Genes oscillate with 24-h periodicity in both axenic and cocultured L:D conditions but lose periodicity under extended darkness.
axenic_LD+coculture_LD.confidence_notes: High confidence due to large gene set and consistent periodicity patterns.

supporting_quotes.quote: The largest group of Prochlorococcus transcripts (42% of all protein-encoding genes) showed 24-h periodicity in both axenic and cocultures under diel L:D conditions but did not continue to oscillate under extended darkness.
Within these general trends in periodic behavior, we found that subsets of the Prochlorococcus transcriptome exhibited periodic oscillations under different combinations of culture conditions.

axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness.name: NATL2A cluster axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness (periodic in axenic darkness and L:D)
axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness.assessment_notes: No explicit mention or data for this cluster.

axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness+c.name: NATL2A cluster axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness+coculture_darkness (periodic across all conditions)
axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness+c.functional_description: Genes in this cluster maintain 24-h periodicity across all four conditions, including both L:D cycles and extended darkness in axenic and coculture. These include genes involved in core metabolic and photosynthetic functions, indicating sustained rhythmicity even in darkness when cocultured.
axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness+c.temporal_pattern: Genes oscillate with 24-h periodicity in all conditions, including extended darkness in both axenic and coculture.
axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness+c.confidence_notes: Moderate to high confidence based on periodicity analysis and gene function.

supporting_quotes.quote: Other transcripts maintained periodic oscillations in different sets of culture conditions, including those that oscillated under all conditions.

Looking more closely at the set of transcripts that continued oscillating under extended darkness in cocultured but not in axenic cells, we find transcripts associated with a variety of metabolic pathways, including the Calvin cycle, glycolysis, fatty acid biosynthesis, glycogen metabolism, and photosynthesis.

axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness+c.assessment_notes: Some uncertainty about exact gene membership and functional enrichment.

axenic_LD+coculture_LD+coculture_darknes.name: NATL2A cluster axenic_LD+coculture_LD+coculture_darkness (periodic in coculture darkness and L:D)
axenic_LD+coculture_LD+coculture_darknes.assessment_notes: No specific discussion or data for this cluster.

axenic_LD+coculture_darkness.name: NATL2A cluster axenic_LD+coculture_darkness (periodic in axenic L:D and coculture darkness)
axenic_LD+coculture_darkness.assessment_notes: No explicit mention or data for this cluster.

coculture_LD.name: NATL2A cluster coculture_LD (coculture L:D periodic)
coculture_LD.functional_description: Genes showing 24-h periodicity only in cocultured Prochlorococcus under diel L:D conditions. This cluster includes genes that maintain rhythmic expression in coculture but not in axenic cultures, suggesting heterotroph influence on timing mechanisms.
coculture_LD.temporal_pattern: Genes oscillate with 24-h periodicity exclusively in coculture L:D conditions and lose periodicity in axenic cultures and extended darkness.
coculture_LD.confidence_notes: Moderate confidence based on periodicity data and coculture effects.

supporting_quotes.quote: More Prochlorococcus transcripts retained their periodicity in cocultures versus axenic cultures, both under extended darkness and even during the normal diel L:D cycle.

coculture_LD+axenic_darkness.name: NATL2A cluster coculture_LD+axenic_darkness (periodic in coculture L:D and axenic darkness)
coculture_LD+axenic_darkness.assessment_notes: No specific data or discussion for this cluster.

coculture_LD+coculture_darkness.name: NATL2A cluster coculture_LD+coculture_darkness (periodic in coculture L:D and darkness)
coculture_LD+coculture_darkness.assessment_notes: No explicit mention or data for this cluster.

coculture_darkness.name: NATL2A cluster coculture_darkness (coculture darkness periodic)
coculture_darkness.assessment_notes: No specific discussion or data for this cluster.

not_periodic.name: NATL2A cluster not_periodic (not periodic)
not_periodic.functional_description: Genes that do not exhibit significant 24-h periodicity under any of the four conditions. These genes likely represent constitutively expressed or non-rhythmic functions in Prochlorococcus.
not_periodic.temporal_pattern: Genes lack 24-h periodic oscillations across all tested conditions, including axenic and coculture L:D and extended darkness.
not_periodic.confidence_notes: High confidence as these genes were identified as non-periodic by the analysis.

supporting_quotes.quote: Other transcripts did not exhibit periodicity under any conditions.
